quote: Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae RTX-toxins: uniform designation of haemolysins, cytolysins, pleurotoxin and their genes
note: Frey et al. 1993, the canonical nomenclature/characterization paper for the ApxI/II/III RTX toxins and their genes (apxICABD operons encode the dedicated RTX type I secretion ABC transporter). Verified resolving via DOI.org Handle API. Replaces a fabricated IAI 1993 DOI.

quote: Characterization of apxIVA, a new RTX determinant of Actinobacillus pleuropneumoniae
note: Schaller et al. 1999. Same paper as the broken ref; the journal's DOI prefix changed from 00221287 to 13500872 in 1999, so only the registered-DOI form differs. Verified resolving.

quote: Vibrio cholerae Strains with Mutations in an Atypical Type I Secretion System Accumulate RTX Toxin Intracellularly
note: Boardman & Satchell 2004: demonstrates the V. cholerae RTX toxin (RtxA) is secreted by the atypical RtxBDE/TolC type I secretion system. Verified resolving. Replaces a non-resolving IAI 2003 DOI.
